goal.summary: Keep resumable working state outside chat history so Pi can continue safely after compactation.

currentWork.lastInterruption: Compaction interrupted the flow before the dedicated Settings sidebar refactor was finished.
currentWork.nextStep: Replace the current evolved SecondarySurface-based Settings shell with a dedicated Settings sidebar and layout.

reportingRule: Always state whether work is finished, still in progress, or was interrupted by compactation.
Persist a checkpoint before and after large refactors.

notes: The repo previously acted only as a tracker; it is being repurposed as the active compactation state source.
The agent visible narration preference work was completed and validated earlier.
The larger dedicated Settings sidebar refactor is not complete yet.
